message:
feat(api): add GitHub heartbeat API endpoint

Add a new API route at /api/github-heartbeat that proxies requests to
the GitHub Events API for real-time activity display on the site.

Features:
- Fetches public events for the configured GitHub username
- Uses server-side caching with 5-minute revalidation (export revalidate = 300)
- Adds Cache-Control headers for CDN edge caching (s-maxage=300, stale-while-revalidate=600)
- Supports optional GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable for higher rate limits
- Returns proper error responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
- Handles rate limiting and API errors gracefully

This endpoint powers the GitHubHeartbeat component which displays recent
commit, push, and repository activity in a timeline format, showing
visitors that the flywheel ecosystem is actively maintained.

Technical details:
- Uses Next.js App Router route handlers
- Requests 30 most recent public events per request
- User-Agent header set to identify the requesting site
- Error handling with try/catch and console logging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
